component.name: Imboard
component.summary: Developer-focused Wayland keyboard for SteamOS Desktop Mode

description.p: Imboard, short for Input Method Board, is a Steam Deck-first virtual keyboard for KDE Wayland Desktop Mode. It is designed for desktop tasks where compact on-screen keyboards make developer keys awkward: symbols, arrows, function keys, lock keys, shortcuts, and custom actions.
Imboard combines a transparent alphabet board with a swipeable developer pad for numbers, symbols, navigation, function keys, shortcuts, and user-defined key actions.
Imboard uses the standard XDG Remote Desktop portal to request keyboard-only control. It does not request screen sharing, pointer control, host filesystem access, or network access.
The supported target is KDE Wayland, especially SteamOS Desktop Mode. Fedora KDE Wayland is also validated. Gamescope/Gaming Mode and non-KDE desktops are outside the current project scope.

screenshot.caption: Main keyboard with function-key developer pad
Transparent overlay while typing in an editor

description.p: Initial release for SteamOS Desktop Mode and KDE Wayland.
